article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry figures and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with notable figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
In collaboration with Barnation, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack,' which contains a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used across various productions.
His production style is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, contributing to a distinctive sound within the electronic music landscape.
Noizekid’s work is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
